top_claims.claim: Leadership / governance on watch. Meta Platforms’ Cloud Push: Growth Opportunity Versus AI Concerns

Meta is a dual-segment compounder: Family of Apps re-accelerated (+33% Q1 2026 revenue) while the company ramps AI data-center spend ($125–145B 2026 capex guide vs $69.7B in 2025). Q1 2026 operating income was $22.9B (+30% YoY). [Fact] GAAP diluted EPS $10.44 in Q1 includes a large $8.03B U.S. Corporate Alternative Min
We expect **9.3%** per year over 7 years at **~$632.51** on **$17.91/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Capex without returns ($125–145B 2026 guide) if FoA ad growth does not convert to sustained free cash flow per share after the infrastructure build.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Capex without returns ($125–145B 2026 guide) if FoA ad growth does not convert to sustained free cash flow per share after the infrastructure build.
Regulatory / antitrust remedies on acquisitions, app store policies, and youth safety (ongoing FTC and EU actions in 10-K risk factors).
Reality Labs losses persist (~$19B guided 2026 operating loss) with uncertain terminal value.
